metadata.description: Authoritative CMA classification rules. CA override rules take precedence over all legacy rules.
sources: Legacy rules (398 items, overridden where conflict exists)

Admin rent -> 68 (Rent, Rates and Taxes). d003 was factory rent=49, but admin rent=68.
Appears under admin Other Expenses. GT=72 (Repairs & Maintenance admin) is correct. Rule=49 (Others) is wrong for a repair item.
CA Q10b confirmed tax delay interest -> 84. d027, d035, d040 all answered rule=84.
Same pattern as d057. All deferred tax P&L items -> gt (rows 100/101, not BS row 171).

doubts.notes: DOUBT: Interest on PPF — is it row 30 (Interest Received) or 34 (Other Income)? PPF is personal savings, not typical bank interest.
DOUBT: Trading company Opening Stock — row 53 (Stock-in-Process Opening) or 58 (FG Opening)? Trading has no WIP, so 58 seems correct but GT consistently uses 53.
DOUBT: Trading company Closing Stock — row 54 (Stock-in-Process Closing) or 59 (FG Closing)? Same question as d079.
DOUBT: Freight Charges under Admin Expenses in trading company — row 47 (Freight inward), 70 (Selling), or 71 (Others)? Context is admin, not inward.
DOUBT: Bad Debts Written Off — row 69 (Bad Debts, trade receivables) or 90 (Sundry Balances Written Off, non-trade)? CA Q27 says 69 but GT=90.
DOUBT: Labour Charges — row 45 (Wages, CA Q1j confirmed) or 49 (Others, GT choice)? May be outsourced contract labor (49) vs direct labor (45).
DOUBT: Manpower Charges — same ambiguity as d129. Row 45 (Wages) or 49 (Others)? d171 and d173 will inherit this answer.
